name: Fernandina Giant Tortoise
conservationEfforts: A single female was found alive on Fernandina Island in 2019, over 100 years after the only other known specimen. Galápagos National Park is searching for additional individuals.
description: Thought extinct for over 100 years until a lone female was found in 2019 on Fernandina, one of the most volcanically active islands in the Galápagos. Expeditions continue searching for more individuals.
